_publications._publicationTitle: Whole exome sequencing reveals the maintained polyclonal nature from primary to metastatic malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor in two patients with NF1.

_contextSnippet: there was no difference in levels of Ki67 or Cleaved Caspase 3 between the groups
details: Successfully detected cleaved caspase 3 levels with no difference observed between control and Trim23 knockdown groups
